title: Silicone Straw Cleaner Brush 4Pcs, Reusable Straws Hanging Cleaning Brush Non-Slip Handle Silicone Bottle Brush Extra Long Soft and Bendable Straws Cleaners Tool for Metal Glass Smoothie Straws Cups
features: Package Contents: This straw cleaners brush package includes 4 pieces of flower handle straw cleaner brushes, available in pink and blue . The straw brush cleaner sufficient quantity ensures you always have spares for daily use

Excellent Design: Each straw cleaning brush is designed with an ergonomic non-slip handle for a secure and comfortable grip, making cleaning easier and more efficient. A built-in hanging hole at the end allows for quick drying and convenient storage after washing, helping the straw brush maintain cleanliness and extending service life.

Premium Material: Made of high-quality food grade silicone with a stainless steel core, these straw brush cleaner are durable, BPA-free, odorless, and safe for daily use. Resistant to deformation and high temperatures, the silicone straws can be sterilized with steam or hot water, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliable cleaning results.

Easy to Clean: The straws reusable are dishwasher safe and can also be rinsed directly under running water. The silicone bristles prevent residue buildup, making them quick to clean and hygienic for reuse. The silicone straws reusable strong construction supports high-temperature cleaning, ensuring maximum convenience and safety.

Wide Application: These reusable silicone straw cleaner brush are not only perfect for stanley straw cleaner but also highly effective for narrow bottle caps, spouts, pacifiers, teapots, and other small spaces. Their multifunctional use makes the silicone bottle brush an essential accessory for the kitchen, travel kit, or baby care, offering reliable cleaning anywhere.
